subTitle: Keiko opts to help Shin-chan take some photographs when he gets the chance to pose for a magazine advertisement. However, Shin-chan accidentally breaks her camera.

subTitle: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Shinchan nohara is a little boy who seems to do everything he can to annoy his parents and teachers (and succeeds wildly), but only means the best. he just tries to have a good time.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: Shin-chan is taken to a music school by Misae so he can learn music. However, the teacher of the institution leaves Misae upset.

title: Guru Aur Bhole
subTitle: When it begins to rain torrentially, Misae quickly moves the clothes to the first floor but forgets to close a tap which leads to flooding.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: When Misae makes the decision to throw away Shin-chan's toys, Shin-chan tries to hide all of them at Shinobu's house.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: In order to make repairs on the broken pipe, Hiroshi climbs on to the roof. However, Shin-chan's incessant mischief causes him to lose his balance.

title: Kicko And Super Speedo
subTitle: Misae tries a new approach to deal with Shin-chan and correct his behaviour by appreciating his mischief instead of berating him.

title: Sudha Murty's Stories of Wit & Magic
subTitle: On New Year's day, Shin-chan asks for a coin but Misae gifts him a ball instead. Later, Misae ends up breaking the ball and gives Shin-chan a coin.

subTitle: Shin-chan and his mother visit the station and await the arrival of the train. Later, Shin-chan forces Misae to take him to a washroom.

title: Guru Aur Bhole
subTitle: Hiroshi takes the family on a fishing trip and his motion sickness makes him vomit. However, he later helps Shin-chan catch a large fish.

title: Kicko And Super Speedo
subTitle: Whilst Misae is out shopping for bargains on a sunday, Hiroshi and Shin-chan decide to go boating by themselves. However, Hiroshi falls asleep.

subTitle: Shin-chan brushes his teeth with new toothpaste and eats unhealthy snacks right after. As a result, Misae is left infuriated and she berates him.

subTitle: Misae berates Shin-chan for his misdemeanours. However, later when Shin-chan drinks alcohol from the fridge by mistake, his behaviour changes.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Ten strangers and a dog wake up on a mysterious spaceship, unaware of why they're there. Meanwhile, the Nohara family faces an uncertain future as they grapple with their bizarre circumstances.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Shinnosuke and companions awaken after 100 years of hibernation. Soon, they realise their last shared memory is a mall parking lot, and the group collaborates to get back to Earth.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Shinnosuke and Ellen witness a small ship's sudden explosion, questioning the motive. Meanwhile, Hiroshi discovers a mysterious door.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: When Hiroshi retrieves a 100-year-old Soda Gold bottle, hungry Shinnosuke attempts to drink it. Later, they discover a pillar of sweet, jelly-like food.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Mr Smith is Jiro Jailbreaker, an 800-year fugitive controlling all the food. Meanwhile, Takosuke butters up Jailbreaker for rations, and Hiroshi pleads for his family's share.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: When Micchi and Yoshirin miss roll call, Shinnosuke and the others go looking for them. However, they discover that the number of capsules does not correspond to the number of people on board.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Shiro suddenly enlarges, causing Jailbreaker to suspect him as the alien. Meanwhile, Hiroshi suggests a method to identify humans as Shiro undergoes further transformation.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Paranoia grips everyone as Jailbreaker guards the food supply with a laser gun. Meanwhile, the situation suddenly shifts when Shinnosuke mentions seeing Chocobi snacks in a closed-off room.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: A robot disguised as a middle-aged woman captures Shinnosuke and friends. However, Jailbreaker helps them escape the confinement, and Ellen goes to find James.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Alien Buttman appears and reveals the humans on board are his food. After Buttman's attack, the group escapes to a food storage room where a robot takes Himawari hostage.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: A tonsil robot emerges from the female shell, guiding the group's escape to Earth. Meanwhile, the mother ship begins to explode, and everyone race to the cockpit.

title: Paap-O-Meter
